matches.x: Verily, thus saith the Lord, I require all their surplus property to be put into the hands of the bishop of my church in Zion,
For verily thus saith the Lord, it is expedient in me for a bishop to be appointed unto you, or of you, unto the church in this part of the Lord’s vineyard.
The word of the Lord, in addition to the law which has been given, making known the duty of the bishop who has been ordained unto the church in this part of the vineyard, which is verily this—

Verily, thus saith the Lord, the time has now como that it shall be disposed of by a Council composed of the First Presidency of my Church, and of the Bishop and his Council ; and by my High Council ; and by mine own voice unto them, saith the Lord. Etch so. Amen.
